title: capsicum regale
intro: Capsicum regale, also known as the royal pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Capsicum regale include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and providing antioxidant effects. Capsicum regale can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
